details: The agent successfully navigated to all three sites and extracted correct information: (1) Wikipedia - correctly identified Graydon Hoare as the designer, confirmed by snapshot content; (2) GitHub - correctly reported 112k stars (100k+), confirmed by snapshot showing 'uid=107_480 link 112k stars'; (3) rust-lang.org - correctly reported the tagline 'A language empowering everyone to build reliable and efficient software.', confirmed by snapshot showing it as a heading. All three sites were visited and data was accurately extracted from actual page snapshots.
